title: Local Nature Guide
description: The child studies respectfully collected nature finds, practices descriptions, and gives a family museum tour.
learningGoals: Build knowledge of familiar local nature objects
Use sensory details in descriptive language
Grow confidence by teaching observations back
interactionModel: tap the large done step after each real-world collecting, study, practice, or presentation activity; timers leave room for close observation
feedbackModel: warm park-ranger speech with sparkle, tick, and tada SFX; every ordinary nature find is celebrated as museum-grade

modes.title: Guide Training
modes.skill: study and describe local nature finds

credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
